title: Game
description: Represents a page on itch.io — a game, tool, comic, book, soundtrack, or other creative work published by a developer.

id.description: Site-wide unique identifier generated by itch.io

url.description: Canonical address of the game's page on itch.io

title.description: Human-friendly title; may contain any character

type.description: Type of the game page: downloadable or embedded

width.description: Width of the initial viewport in pixels

height.description: Height of the initial viewport in pixels

fullscreen.description: Whether a fullscreen button should be shown

coverUrl.description: Cover URL; might be a GIF

stillCoverUrl.description: Non-animated cover URL; only set when coverUrl is a GIF

createdAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the game page was created

publishedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the game was published; null if not published

minPrice.description: Minimum price in cents of a dollar (0 = free)

canBeBought.description: Whether payments are accepted for this game

hasDemo.description: Whether a free demo is available

inPressSystem.description: Whether this game is part of the itch.io press system

platforms.description: Platforms this game is available for

user.description: The user account this game is associated to

userId.description: ID of the user account this game is associated to

sale.description: The best current sale for this game

rate.description: Discount rate in percent; may be negative (reverse sale)

published.description: Owner-only: whether the game is currently published
